name: Rutger Hendrickx
title: Full Stack Developer
description: My name is Rutger Hendrickx, a 28 years old Full Stack Developer from the bright city of Leuven, Belgium.

I love turning complex problems into simple, clean and intuitive systems. I am passionate about software development, architecture, clean code, domain driven design, functional programming, you name it!
As Full Stack Developer I mainly focus on web technologies including NodeJS, C#, TypeScript, React and GraphQL and much more.
